items.title: I was one of the media voters. Went 6-for-6 on the frontcourt selections here and my guards were Paige, Miles, Rhyne and Plum. Thought about taking off KP for Caitlin but decided it wasn't fair to punish KP for getting injured at the exact time ballots were due. It all worked out

items.title: Wings try to add more pressure on Olivia Miles, hard show in P&R and Shepard holds. Miles looks to drive the other way and it's contained. Problem is the Lynx will keep it moving and once they get you in rotation it's tough.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Wings try to add more pressure on Olivia Miles, hard show in P&R and Shepard holds. Miles looks to drive the other way and it's contained. Problem is the Lynx will keep it moving and once they get you in rotation it's tough. 

Reject vs the show opens the roll, pass, kick for 3

items.title: Pick and roll for Olivia Miles, defense stays on the side to protect the pocket pass and then it's a late switch. Weakside pulls in on the roll, skip to McBride for 3.

media.title: Source: Sixers signing Vanderbilt guard Duke Miles to Exhibit 10 contract
media.description: Duke Miles' six-year collegiate career has included stops at High Point, Troy, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt.

items.title: Miles, 24, played at Troy, High Point, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt across six collegiate seasons. Led SEC with 2.6 steals per game last season while shooting 90.1 percent on free throws. Shot 9.5 three-point attempts per 100 possession last season (34.8 percent). Interesting profile.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Miles, 24, played at Troy, High Point, Oklahoma and Vanderbilt across six collegiate seasons. Led SEC with 2.6 steals per game last season while shooting 90.1 percent on free throws. Shot 9.5 three-point attempts per 100 possession last season (34.8 percent). Interesting profile.

items.title: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier to
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: NEWS: The Sixers are signing Duke Miles to an Exhibit 10 contract, source tells @phillyvoice.com. An E10 deal is a training camp contract which gives the player a signing bonus if they are waived and report to that team's affiliate in the G League. Vandy On SI reported earlier today.

items.title: Mikal Bridges has run the most miles this season, totaling 260.1 (including playoffs), which is equivalent to 9.93 marathons. It’s the third most in a season (regular season + play-in + playoffs), since the #NBA started tracking speed and distance stats in the 2013–14 season.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Mikal Bridges has run the most miles this season, totaling 260.1 (including playoffs), which is equivalent to 9.93 marathons. It’s the third most in a season (regular season + play-in + playoffs), since the #NBA started tracking speed and distance stats in the 2013–14 season.

(via CrazyStats)

items.title: Teams keep working to throw different coverages at Olivia Miles. Keeps having the patience to poke at them. Stokes at the level and hits, keeps attacking to get around it. Re-sets and fires to the corner for a 3.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: Teams keep working to throw different coverages at Olivia Miles. Keeps having the patience to poke at them. Stokes at the level and hits, keeps attacking to get around it. Re-sets and fires to the corner for a 3.

items.title: 🚨NEW: Olivia Miles must have felt like Wednesday was a NASCAR race: every time she went left, she zoomed to the finish line with a layup. The LA Sparks, missing Kelsey Plum and Cameron Brink, had no answer, losing to the Lynx. Sometimes basketball is simple.🔗 justinrusso.substack
items.author: Justin Russo

The LA Sparks, missing Kelsey Plum and Cameron Brink, had no answer, losing to the Lynx. Sometimes basketball is simple.🔗 justinrusso.substack.com/p/sparks-mil...

items.title: Olivia Miles spoke before the Sparks-Lynx matchup about who she looked up to growing up, and she mentioned Luka Dončić. She went on to score a career high 31 points in Minnesota's win in LA.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: Olivia Miles spoke before the Sparks-Lynx matchup about who she looked up to growing up, and she mentioned Luka Dončić. She went on to score a career high 31 points in Minnesota's win in LA.

items.title: Final: Lynx 99, Sparks 83. The Sparks have not beaten Minnesota in Los Angeles since September 2019. Olivia Miles scored 31 points on 12-for-15 shooting. Sparks fall to 7-8 and get New York on Sunday. We’ll see if Kelsey Plum is back for that one.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Lynx 99, Sparks 83. The Sparks have not beaten Minnesota in Los Angeles since September 2019. Olivia Miles scored 31 points on 12-for-15 shooting. Sparks fall to 7-8 and get New York on Sunday. We’ll see if Kelsey Plum is back for that one.

items.title: Halftime: Lynx 52, Sparks 37. Olivia Miles scored 17 of her game-high 24 points in the second quarter. Miles made as many shots as the Sparks did in the frame. Rae Burrell leads the Sparks with 14 points. Sparks are shooting 43%, but have 10 turnovers.

items.title: Our media shuttle broke down when we got back to Boston. (In front of the Globe, actually.) Had to walk a couple of miles to my car. Ended up being cool — saw about 200 people in kilts, and a horde of Norway fans of all different ages kicking a ball around on Washington St. One t
items.author: Chad Finn
items.body_excerpt: Our media shuttle broke down when we got back to Boston. (In front of the Globe, actually.) Had to walk a couple of miles to my car. Ended up being cool — saw about 200 people in kilts, and a horde of Norway fans of all different ages kicking a ball around on Washington St. One to remember.
